tasks.subject: Task 1: gitignore coverage/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stop Jest's coverage/ output showing as untracked clutter.

**Files:** Modify .gitignore (append `coverage/`).

**Precondition:** `git ls-files coverage/` must be empty (nothing tracked under it).

**Verify:** `git check-ignore coverage/` exit 0; `git status --porcelain` no longer lists coverage/.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "git check-ignore coverage/", "acceptanceCriteria": [".gitignore contains coverage/", "git ls-files coverage/ empty precondition verified", "git status no longer lists coverage/", "no coverage/ file ever staged"], "reviewModel": "cheap"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Daily movie list 50 -> ~500 (TMDB-sourced generator)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Regenerate data/dailyMovies.json with >=500 TMDB-sourced entries (ids valid by construction) via committed one-time scripts/build-daily-movies.js; runtime path unchanged. Add structural test; fix 2 stale comments.

**Files:** Create scripts/build-daily-movies.js, server/systems/dailyMovies.data.test.js; modify data/dailyMovies.json (regenerated), package.json (add build:daily-movies script), server/systems/dailySystem.js (stale <10KB comment ~L37-39), server/systems/dailySystem.test.js (stale ~50-entries comment ~L63-65).

**Key facts:** TMDB token = process.env.TMDB_READ_TOKEN; headers {Authorization:`Bearer ${t}`, accept:'application/json'} (mirror server.js:250/265); endpoints api.themoviedb.org/3/movie/top_rated|popular?language=en-US&page=N; Node18+ global fetch; dotenv is a dep. Union-in the 50 existing curated ids; dedupe by id; sort by id; 2-space JSON + trailing newline.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/systems/dailyMovies.data.test.js server/systems/dailySystem.test.js` PASS; `npm test` all pass; coverage floors held.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build-daily-movies.js", "data/dailyMovies.json", "package.json", "server/systems/dailySystem.js", "server/systems/dailySystem.test.js", "server/systems/dailyMovies.data.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/dailyMovies.data.test.js server/systems/dailySystem.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": [">=500 unique entries each {id,title,year,mediaType:movie}", "all 50 original curated ids present", "package.json build:daily-movies script", "data test passes, dailySystem.test.js unchanged-assertions passes, 2 stale comments fixed", "npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: PWA manifest icons (SVG)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a self-contained SVG app icon + manifest.icons[] + index.html icon/apple-touch links so the app is installable (Android/desktop).

**Files:** Create public/icon.svg, server/manifest.data.test.js; modify public/manifest.json (add icons after categories), public/index.html (2 link tags after L17 manifest link).

**Palette (from 01-base.css :root):** bg #09090b (== theme_color), accent #818cf8. SVG: viewBox 0 0 512 512, mark within central ~80% (maskable-safe), no external refs.

**Verify:** `npx jest server/manifest.data.test.js` PASS; `npm test` all pass; coverage floors held.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/icon.svg", "public/manifest.json", "public/index.html", "server/manifest.data.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/manifest.data.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["public/icon.svg self-contained square maskable-safe #09090b/#818cf8", "manifest.icons[] references /icon.svg", "index.html has icon + apple-touch-icon links", "manifest.data.test.js passes", "npm test green, coverage floors held"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Service worker (conservative, network-first)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Conservative first SW: network-first + cache fallback for same-origin GET; hard bypass non-GET / cross-origin / /socket.io; no skipWaiting. Pure swDecision() unit-tested (UMD: importScripts in sw.js, require in Jest).

**Files:** Create public/sw-routing.js, public/sw.js, client-tests/sw-routing.test.js; modify public/js/app.js (register on window load, guarded+swallowed, before the DOMContentLoaded handler's closing `});` ~L910).

**Contract:** swDecision({method,url,mode,origin}) -> 'bypass' (non-GET / cross-origin / /socket.io / unparseable) | 'network-first' (same-origin GET nav+static). Cache 'mm-cache-v1'; install precache ['/']; activate delete-stale + clients.claim; NO skipWaiting.

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/sw-routing.test.js` PASS; `npm test` all pass; coverage floors held; manual SW smoke (registers, app+socket work, offline shell loads) reported.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/sw-routing.js", "public/sw.js", "public/js/app.js", "client-tests/sw-routing.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/sw-routing.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["swDecision bypass for non-GET/cross-origin/socket.io/unparseable; network-first for same-origin GET nav+static", "sw.js mm-cache-v1, precache ['/'], activate cleanup+claim, NO skipWaiting", "app.js registers /sw.js on load guarded+swallowed", "sw-routing.test.js passes", "npm test green, coverage floors held", "manual SW smoke reported"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: .btn additive base class (provable zero-visual-change)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `.btn { cursor: pointer; }` (the only declaration all 9 button variants already share) to the END of 01-base.css + add `btn` token to audited buttons. ADDITIVE ONLY — no variant rule modified; provable zero visual change.

**Files:** Modify public/css/01-base.css (append one .btn rule), public/index.html (prepend `btn ` to buttons already carrying one of the 9 audited variants), public/js/ui/ui-render.js (L602 shareBtn, L609 playAgainBtn), public/js/ui/ui-panels.js (L339 replayBtn).

**9 audited variants (all already declare cursor:pointer):** .btn-primary/.btn-secondary/.btn-icon/.nav-link-btn/.btn-join-team/.reaction-btn/.mode-chip/.spec-pred-btn/.modal-close. Do NOT add `btn` to .btn-kick/.self-elim-close/.mobile-tab/app.js inline overlay buttons. Do NOT remove/modify any variant declaration.

**Verify:** `npm test` all pass; `git diff` shows only additions (one CSS rule + `btn ` tokens), zero deletions in variant blocks; manual visual smoke reported.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/01-base.css", "public/index.html", "public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/js/ui/ui-panels.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["01-base.css end has exactly one new rule .btn{cursor:pointer} with WHY comment", "no existing variant block modified (diff additions only)", "btn token added only to elements already carrying one of the 9 audited variants (index.html + 3 JS buttons)", "client-tests pass unchanged, npm test green, coverage floors held", "manual visual smoke reported"], "reviewModel": "standard"}
```
